text: Believe in yourself and all that you are. Know that there is something inside you that is greater than any obstacle.
author: Christian D. Larson

text: The secret of getting ahead is getting started. Stop waiting and take the first step.
author: Mark Twain

text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
author: Confucius

text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
author: Winston Churchill

text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
author: C.S. Lewis

text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do. Let passion drive your every step.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
author: Henry David Thoreau

text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going and success will follow.
author: Sam Levenson

text: The road to success and the road to failure are almost exactly the same. Your choices define the destination.
author: Colin R. Davis

text: Opportunities don't happen. You create them with relentless effort and an open mind.
author: Chris Grosser

text: Happiness is not something ready-made. It comes from your own actions and the choices you make every day.
author: Dalai Lama

text: The most important thing is to enjoy your life — to be happy — it's all that matters.
author: Audrey Hepburn

text: Count your age by friends, not years. Count your life by smiles, not tears.
author: John Lennon

text: For every minute you are angry you lose sixty seconds of happiness. Guard your joy carefully.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

text: Happiness is when what you think, what you say, and what you do are in harmony.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

text: Spread love everywhere you go. Let no one ever come to you without leaving happier.
author: Mother Teresa

text: The best thing to hold onto in life is each other. Love is the anchor of the soul.
author: Audrey Hepburn

text: Where there is love there is life, and where there is life, love gives it meaning.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

text: You know you're in love when you can't fall asleep because reality is finally better than your dreams.
author: Dr. Seuss

text: Love yourself first and everything else falls into line. You really have to love yourself to get anything done in this world.
author: Lucille Ball

text: The mind is everything. What you think you become. Guard your thoughts with great care.
author: Buddha

text: An unexamined life is not worth living. Reflect, question, and grow every single day.
author: Socrates

text: Turn your wounds into wisdom and let every hardship be your greatest teacher.
author: Oprah Winfrey

text: Yesterday I was clever, so I wanted to change the world. Today I am wise, so I am changing myself.
author: Rumi

text: Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom. Look inward before you seek outward.
author: Aristotle
